Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0365 "ZORRO-0334-0365" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0334 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zorro (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0334 which performs the following for the game to start properly: 1. Sets $00 to $EF 2. Sets $01FE to $00 and $01FF to $7F 3. Sets the stack pointer to $FD 4. Jumps to $0365 (it couldn't use RTS because of the stack being modified)
Note: the code at $0334 was placed there by first zeroing out $0334 to $0365 which contained startup code which was no longer needed. Also the game must be dumped at the 6th break on $0365.
